items.headline: MCP list pagination was silently dropping items
items.body: Claude Code 2.1.146 fixed a bug where `resources/list`, `resources/templates/list`, and `prompts/list` were dropping all items past the first page on paginating MCP servers. ADO MCP Server likely hits this any time it lists work items or repos across a large Azure DevOps project. Worth a spot-check: push the item count past the first-page limit and confirm everything surfaces.
